intro: Useful links and knowledge for divers to become a better diver — videos, reels, and reading curated for study and weekend dive prep.

items.title: The Frog Kick
items.description: Frog kick finning technique — efficient propulsion with less silt disturbance.

items.title: SDI/TDI Finning — Frog Kick
items.description: Instructional breakdown of frog kick finning for scuba divers.

items.title: How To Recover and Clear a Scuba Regulator
items.description: SDI open-water skill — recover and clear a scuba regulator underwater.

items.title: Technical hand signals — part 4
items.description: Hand signals for question, switch on lights, call the dive, and emergency exit swim.

items.title: Technical diving hand signals
items.description: Guess-the-signal quiz — clear one-hand, one-message communication for tech diving.

items.title: How to dump your BC
items.description: The “official” way to vent your BC is the way that works best for you — know your equipment.
